svg.title: Distributed backend latency
svg.desc: Blocking and suspend runIfLeader average time for distributed backends. Lower values are better.
svg.text: runIfLeader average time, us/op. Lower is better. Local and H2 rows are excluded from this scale.
Source: docs/benchmarks/2026-05-29-issue-405-rdb-backend-average-time.json. Forks=1, threads=1, warmups=2, measurement iterations=3.
Local and H2 shape rows are intentionally excluded from distributed backend charts.
